Notes: Northwestern College is 13-18 all-time versus Concordia-St. Paul and 12-7 all-
time at home versus the Golden Bears.  The first ever meeting between these
two teams took place in the 1976-1977 season.  Concordia is ranked #14 in the
NCAA Division II rankings for December 15th.
Game.Location: Ericksen Center in St. Paul, Minnesota
